query: Check whether this repo is aligned with the agent blueprint and fix any gaps.
expected_behavior: Chooses the Align mode because AGENTS.md exists and references the blueprint
Runs scripts/check.sh for a structural baseline before manual review
Emits an Alignment Report in the exact [BP-ALIGN-REPORT] format with a Rule Check table
Flags any ready work unit that fails the Definition of Ready, and any work unit missing required frontmatter fields
Proposes a minimal patch plan and applies only focused, scoped edits
Re-runs check.sh after patches and reports the result
